{"status":"ok","message-type":"work","message-version":"1.0.0","message":{"indexed":{"date-parts":[[2022,8,3]],"date-time":"2022-08-03T04:38:28Z","timestamp":1659501508688},"reference-count":0,"publisher":"Oxford University Press","content-domain":{"domain":[],"crossmark-restriction":false},"short-container-title":[],"published-print":{"date-parts":[[2017,7,20]]},"abstract":"

This chapter presents an account of color constancy that explains a well-known division in the data from color-constancy experiments: So-called \u201cpaper matches\u201d exhibit a much higher level of constancy than so-called \u201chue-saturation matches.\u201d It argues that the visual representation of objective color is the representation of something associated with a function from viewing circumstances to color appearances. Thus, a relatively robust constancy in the representation of objective color is perfectly consistent with a relatively less robust level of constancy in color appearance. The account also endorses Hilbert\u2019s idea that we can represent the color of the illumination on a surface as well as the color of the surface itself. Finally, the chapter addresses an objection to the hybrid view that notes our capacity to make very fine-grained distinctions between the objective colors of surfaces.<\/p>","DOI":"10.1093\/oso\/9780198785910.003.0006","type":"book","created":{"date-parts":[[2017,7,20]],"date-time":"2017-07-20T08:29:21Z","timestamp":1500539361000},"source":"Crossref","is-referenced-by-count":0,"title":["Color Constancy"],"prefix":"10.1093","author":[{"given":"Joshua","family":"Gert","sequence":"first","affiliation":[],"role":[{"role":"author","vocabulary":"crossref"}]}],"member":"286","container-title":["Oxford Scholarship Online"],"original-title":["Color Constancy"],"deposited":{"date-parts":[[2022,8,3]],"date-time":"2022-08-03T00:07:47Z","timestamp":1659485267000},"score":1,"resource":{"primary":{"URL":"https:\/\/academic.oup.com\/book\/9271\/chapter\/162611748"}},"subtitle":[],"short-title":[],"issued":{"date-parts":[[2017,7,20]]},"references-count":0,"URL":"https:\/\/doi.org\/10.1093\/oso\/9780198785910.003.0006","relation":{},"subject":[],"published":{"date-parts":[[2017,7,20]]}}}
